summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an epic post‑drums Dark Star with a rare Playin’ Reprise, highlighting the band at its peak.
review: The reviewer hails this performance as a truly epic show, pointing out the beautiful intro and the daring decision to run a full Dark Star right after the drums, even inserting a Playin' Reprise in the middle. No technical flaws are mentioned, implying a clear, well‑balanced recording that lets the musical brilliance shine.

ai_rating.rationale: Single five‑star review praises both the performance and implies good sound quality; limited data yields low confidence but rating reflects strong positive feedback.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints about audio; intro described as beautiful, suggesting clear and well‑balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A post‑drums complete Dark Star with a Playin’ Reprise inserted mid‑song creates an unusual and thrilling arc praised by the reviewer.
